Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: We need to analyze the log Activities Initiate Request Verify Documents Call Customer Submit Additional Adjust Account Approve Request Some appear multiple times Verify Documents appears twice in C001 and twice in C003 Call Customer appears twice in C002 and twice in C003 also maybe Submit Additional only once

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: We need to rename activities to reflect context For Verify Documents first time is initial verification of identity documents second time after missing docs or after account adjustment may be re verification or re check So rename first as Initial Document Verification Second as Re Verification of Documents

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Call Customer first call may be for missing docs in C001 or clarify discrepancy in C002 or customer stepped out in C003 Second call may be follow up after additional docs submitted in C001 confirm adjustments made in C002 So we can rename first call as Outbound Call for Missing Information maybe Outbound Call for Missing Docs or Clarification Second call as Follow Up Call

Name: Heuristic Reasoning - IND
Text: Adjust Account occurs only once per case but could be internal correction due to missing info Submit Additional is unique Approve Request final approval

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: We should consider context So we propose new names Initial Document Verification Re Verification of Documents Outbound Call for Missing Docs Outbound Call Clarify Discrepancy Outbound Follow Up Call Confirm Adjustments Internal Account Adjustment Final Approval

Name: Validation - PE
Text: The instruction says rename activities that recur within the same case so we do not need to change non recurring ones like Submit Additional Initiate Request stays same Approve Request stays same Only changes needed are for Verify Documents and Call Customer that appear more than once within a single case
